active_projects.description: Create /finance command (finance.md), research skill (skill-finance/SKILL.md), and research agent (finance-agent.md) for the founder extension. Command uses AUDIT/MODEL/FORECAST/VALIDATE modes with 5 forcing questions. Skill follows 11-stage execution pattern. Agent analyzes existing financial documents, extracts numbers, and creates verification spreadsheets (.xlsx) to confirm/improve calculations.

artifacts.summary: Research on existing founder extension patterns for finance command design
3-phase plan: create core files, update integration files, verify

active_projects.completion_summary: Created /finance command, skill-finance, and finance-agent for founder extension. Updated manifest.json, EXTENSION.md, and index-entries.json.
active_projects.claudemd_suggestions: Added finance-agent.md, skill-finance, /finance command to founder extension with full routing and context integration.

active_projects.description: Wire /finance into the founder extension: add finance-agent, skill-finance, and /finance command to manifest.json routing tables. Add context entries to index-entries.json. Update EXTENSION.md documentation. Optionally add financial-analysis.typ Typst template.
active_projects.completion_summary: Integration work was completed as part of task 330 Phase 2. manifest.json updated with finance routing, EXTENSION.md updated with /finance docs, index-entries.json updated with 3 new finance context entries and finance-agent added to 3 existing entries.

artifacts.summary: Comprehensive analysis of Neovim and WezTerm configurations showing no automatic directory-changing behavior

active_projects.description: Add Stage 6a verification checklist to founder-plan-agent.md mirroring planner-agent's pattern. Verify all 7 required metadata fields (Status, Task, Effort, Dependencies, Research Inputs, Artifacts, Standards, Type), all 7 required sections, phase heading format (### under ## Implementation Phases), and per-phase fields (Goal, Tasks checklist, Timing).

2-phase plan: add Stage 6a verification section, update Critical Requirements

active_projects.completion_summary: Added Stage 6a plan format verification to founder-plan-agent.md. Verifies all 8 required metadata fields, all 7 required sections, phase heading format, and per-phase fields before writing success metadata.
active_projects.claudemd_suggestions: Added Stage 6a verification section and updated Critical Requirements in founder-plan-agent.md

active_projects.description: Add generic/edit task_type fallback path to founder-plan-agent.md Stage 4 and Stage 5. When task doesn't fit specialized templates (market-sizing, competitive-analysis, gtm-strategy, contract-review, project-timeline, cost-breakdown), fall back to standard plan-format.md template structure instead of improvising.

artifacts.summary: Analysis of coverage gap in founder-plan-agent and design for generic fallback
3-phase plan: update Stage 4 routing, add generic phase structure to Stage 5, update critical requirements

active_projects.description: Create .claude/rules/plan-format-enforcement.md with path glob specs/**/plans/**. Lists required metadata fields and section headings as a checklist reminder for any agent writing plan files. Defense-in-depth to catch format violations regardless of which agent creates the plan.

artifacts.summary: Analysis of existing rule patterns and plan format requirements
2-phase plan to create plan-format enforcement rule

active_projects.completion_summary: Created .claude/rules/plan-format-enforcement.md with paths: specs/**/plans/** frontmatter. Concise checklist of 8 required metadata fields, 7 required sections, and phase format requirements. References plan-format.md for full specification.
active_projects.claudemd_suggestions: Added plan-format-enforcement.md rule to .claude/rules/ with auto-apply path glob for plan files.
